title: Ratification of the Initial Constitutional Corpus
summary: Ratify the initial Constitutional Corpus of OpenInnovate DAO LLC comprising 144 documents across four tiers, establishing the intellectual foundation that the Algorithmic Manager consults when evaluating governance proposals.
body: Pursuant to Article VIII of the Operating Agreement, the Constitutional Corpus is the persistent context library consulted by the Algorithmic Manager when making governance Decisions. This proposal ratifies the initial corpus population, establishing the baseline collection of governance, civic, systems, and statutory texts. The corpus manifest hash provides cryptographic proof of the exact contents at the time of ratification. Future additions, removals, or weight changes are Governance Acts per Section 8.3.

tier1_governance.contents: Buffett Owner's Manual, 48 Berkshire Hathaway Shareholder Letters (1977-2024), Munger's Psychology of Human Misjudgment

tier2_civic.contents: UN Universal Declaration of Human Rights, Ostrom's 8 Principles for Managing a Commons, 85 Federalist Papers (Hamilton, Madison, Jay)

tier3_systems.contents: Meadows' Leverage Points, Buterin/Hitzig/Weyl Quadratic Funding paper, DAO governance mechanisms paper, DAO survey paper

tier4_wyoming.contents: Wyoming Constitution, Wyoming DAO Supplement (W.S. 17-31-101 through 17-31-116)

knownGaps: US Constitution (content filter prevented automated inclusion — to be added in subsequent governance act)
Additional systems thinking texts (e.g., MIT OpenCourseWare materials) may be proposed in future acts
action: Commit the corpus manifest hash on-chain, establishing cryptographic proof of the initial corpus contents.
